summary: Previous response missed the question, user asking again verbatim
detailed_context: Nick asked about the Telegram-started agent's status, but the previous response pivoted entirely to Interceptor, yaml breakage, and build status—never addressing the Telegram agent at all. By asking the exact same question again, Nick signals clear dissatisfaction and that the AI fundamentally misunderstood what was being asked. This is a classic repeated-request pattern indicating the AI went off-topic.
